commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; the protected maintainer label and clean review leave current-base CI and maintainer merge judgment as the remaining action.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain concern found; the diff changes gateway warning logic, tests, and docs without dependency, workflow, credential, or execution-surface changes. (sha=52fee3f76239fd380d0eae0c0ae3813db4925c1e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR dedupes gateway probe/status `multiple_gateways` warnings by gateway self identity, adds a process-level self `instanceId`, and updates focused tests and gateway docs.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +246, Docs +2. Total +303 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main warns from `reachable.length > 1`, and `runGatewayStatusProbePass` can include both `sshTunnel` and `configRemote` for the same gateway when URLs differ; the linked issue supplies the concrete config/CLI path.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the protected maintainer label and clean review leave current-base CI and maintainer merge judgment as the remaining action.

target.title: fix(gateway): dedupe probe warnings by gateway identity
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes #69135 by suppressing `multiple_gateways` only when reachable probe targets report the same provable gateway self identity.
- Gateway self presence now exposes a process-level `instanceId`; same-host/same-config ambiguity without a process/device identity remains conservative and still warns.
- SSH tunnel, proxy/TLS URL, and configured remote URL can resolve to the same gateway even when transport ports differ.
- Docs and regression tests now describe distinct, same, and identity-ambiguous gateway cases.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/system-presence.test.ts src/infra/system-presence.version.test.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.test.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 4 files, 22 tests passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/infra/system-presence.ts docs/cli/gateway.md docs/gateway/index.md docs/gateway/multiple-gateways.md docs/gateway/troubleshooting.md src/commands/gateway-presence.test.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/infra/system-presence.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.test.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.ts`
- `git diff --check refs/remotes/upstream-safe/main...HEAD`
- `git diff --check`
- `codex review --base refs/remotes/upstream-safe/main` -> no discrete regression found

Signed head: `52fee3f76239fd380d0eae0c0ae3813db4925c1e`.
